name: audio-haxor
description: Desktop app to scan and manage VST/VST3/AU audio plugins, samples, and DAW projects

scripts.test: node --test test/scanner.test.js test/update-worker.test.js test/ui.test.js && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.clean: rm -rf src-tauri/target dist node_modules/.cache && echo 'Cleaned build caches'
scripts.rebuild: pnpm run clean && pnpm run tauri:build
